caption: So the other day, I went to this spot @t_nakameguro 📍1F コンフォート中目 37-12, Kamimeguro 2-Chōme Meguro, Tokyo Japan 153-0051 and tried this Omi Beef Wagyu, it’s the only restaurant in the world allowed to serve it! #omibeef #newforkcity #japan #newforkcity  #foodphotography #japanesefood #tokyofood #tokyo
transcript: so the other day i went to japan to this spot called tea nakamaguro and had what people are saying is possibly the best steak on the planet this is actually the only restaurant in the entire world that's allowed to serve this ultra rare a5 wagyu omi meat the meal consists of them cooking up one of these t-bones and then making six different dishes over six courses and i gotta be honest this was one of the best meals i've had in my entire life for the first course you get to just try a couple pieces of the steak right after they cook it and it is indescribably good it completely melts in your mouth it's the best bite of steak i've ever had without a doubt next up was their wagyu blt where they take some of the steak slice it super thin and put it in a sandwich this honestly didn't look that impressive to me but i took a bite and it just melts like butter it was incredible next was this ramen dish where they add the t-bone from the steak to this super rich broth that they've been slow cooking forever it has chunks of the steak in it and these fresh handmade noodles this was so delicious these grilled lobster tails that they top with this curry sauce that has the beef fat and some steak in it was ridiculous this is their shabu shabu they cook some of the steak in this broth and then thinly slice it and cover it with truffle it's insane they even paired some of the steak with some fresh sea cream added some different type of broth to it this was also delicious and even though they eventually threw me out of the restaurant for being annoying i still had a really great time
